title: Continue the driftpet overnight loop with real-usage evidence
intent: Continue the existing OMX-led overnight loop without changing driftpet's product scope.
defaultGoal: Run the next real-usage pass and leave fresh verification evidence.
outOfScope: Replacing .omx as the source of truth
acceptance: Each iteration lands one bounded improvement.
Verification evidence is refreshed before claiming completion.
README, plan docs, and overnight outputs stay aligned with the current product shape.
Workflow Fusion runtime files remain a projection of .omx state, not a competing authority.
riskBoundary: Do not widen driftpet beyond the current V1 loop.
Do not let `.workflow/runtime` drift away from `.omx` without resyncing.
If verification evidence is missing or contradictory, stop short of claiming `已通过`.
